code: export const handlePress=({onPress,value,onValueChange,event})=>{if(onPress&&onValueChange){console.warn(`onPress in the scope of RadioButtonGroup will not be executed, use onValueChange instead`);}onValueChange?onValueChange(value):onPress===null||onPress===void 0?void 0:onPress(event);};export const isChecked=({value,status,contextValue})=>{if(contextValue!==undefined&&contextValue!==null){return contextValue===value?'checked':'unchecked';}else{return status;}};
